evidence_sentence: 1) Using DL to Improve the Performance of a Speciﬁc Processing Module of the Communication Receiver: In terms of channel estimation, in [8] a DL-based channel estimator under time-varying Rayleigh fading channel was proposed and the proposed DL-based estimator has better Mean Square Error (MSE) performance compared with the traditional algo- rithms.
In [9], a DL-based channel estimator was ﬁrst trained ofﬂine using simulated data and then dynamically adjusted online to effectively improve the generalization ability of the estimator.
